emails.subject: Duke Exchange Deal, March 2000
emails.body: Duke Exchange Deal, March 2000 Purchase Deal #157288 It appears that the price on PGEV should be Index less $.06 not Index less $.05 for the redelivery. Let me know which is correct per the exchange agreement. Thanks- K

emails.subject: Re: Duke Exchange Deal, March 2000
emails.body: Re: Duke Exchange Deal, March 2000 KH, We created deal 229758 a while back to correct this. You will need to get Vol Mgmt to reallocate volumes from #157288 to this deal to close it out. D Katherine Herrera@ENRON 09/19/2000 04:52 PM
